betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Welcome to Trinity§f:
Trinity is a nuclear weapons mod that adds fission bombs, thermonuclear weapons, dirty bombs, antimatter bombs, and supporting infrastructure. This questline unlocks the detonator, the necessary precursor items, and the assembly chain for nuclear weapons.

§6Detonator Recipe (TrinityRecipes.java:74)§f:
The Nuclear Detonator (trinity:detonator) is the trigger for all Trinity nuclear weapons. Recipe:
- Pattern "TP / PBP / P " (3×3 with diagonal layout)
- T = vanilla Redstone Torch
- P = ingotPlutonium242 (NC)
- B = vanilla Stone Button

Yields 1 Detonator per craft.

§6What Trinity Adds§f:
Trinity contributes the following weapon types:
- §bFission Bombs§f: U-233, U-235, Np-237, Pu-239, Am-242, Cm-247, Bk-248, Cf-249, Cf-251
- §bSalted Fission Bombs§f: same fissile cores, with Gold-198 (Au-198) cladding for enhanced fallout
- §bThermonuclear Cores§f: Pu-239-based fusion devices
- §bAntimatter Bomb§f: built from Elite Plating + Antimatter Cell
- §bDirty Bomb§f: conventional explosive + radioactive material
- §bRadioactive Blocks§f: trinitite, fallout rain

§6Detonator Mechanics (ItemDetonator.java)§f:
The Detonator is a hand-held item. Right-click a placed bomb block to arm it; right-click again to detonate. There is a configurable arming delay (TrinityConfig.armTime) and a long cooldown to prevent rapid re-use.

§6Supporting Items§f:
Trinity adds:
- §bCompression Charge§f (trinity:compression_charge) — explosive lens for implosion-type bombs (TrinityRecipes.java:75)
- §bNeutron Initiator§f (trinity:neutron_initiator) — Polonium-Beryllium initiator for the chain reaction
- §bBomb Pit§f variants — empty cores ready to be filled with a fissile material
- §bFusion Bomb§f (trinity:fusion_bomb) — deuterium-tritium fusion device
- §bEmpty Fusion Bomb§f — pre-fusion assembly
- §bBaratol Block§f — explosive charge component

§6Direct Descendants of Detonator (TaskRetrieval)§f:
The graph shows 3 ingredients used in the detonator recipe:
- Redstone Torch (minecraft)
- Plutonium-242 (nuclearcraft:uranium:8) — fertile material used as a stable Pu source
- Button (minecraft)

§6Trinity Dependencies§f:
Trinity requires:
- NC: ingotPlutonium242, dustPolonium, ingotBeryllium, ingotUranium233, ingotUranium235, ingotPlutonium239, ingotLithium6Deuteride
- HBM NTM (optional): ingotGold198 for salted bombs, additional radiation materials
- QMD (optional): cellAntimatter for the Antimatter Bomb

§6Prerequisites§f:
Requires q30041 (Isotope Separator) — without enriched isotopes, you cannot craft the bomb cores.

§eTip§f: Build a dedicated weapons facility in a remote location. Trinity bombs produce massive explosions that will level your base if detonated nearby.

§eTip§f: Salted bombs produce more lingering fallout than uns salted variants. Use them for area denial, not anti-structure work.

§cWarning§f: Trinity bombs can destroy hundreds of blocks in a single detonation. Always use them in a controlled test environment first, and never detonate one in your main base.
